options.name: <modeName>
options.description: Name of the constraint mode to query

options.name: -ilm_sdc_files
options.description: Returns the ILM flow SDC files associated with the specified constraint mode

options.name: -sdc_files
options.description: Returns SDC files associated with the specified constraint mode

options.name: -tcl_vars
options.description: Returns the list of tcl vars associated with the specified constraint mode
